sleeping-village.blurb: A two-room DIY-leaning music venue in Avondale from the operators of Empty Bottle and Thalia Hall. The front-of-house is a full-service bar with a hi-fi listening rig; the back is a proper black-box performance room.
notes: Sister venue to Empty Bottle and Thalia Hall — all operated by 16" on Center.
Programming leans eclectic: indie/experimental headliners, jazz nights, DIY residencies.
The back room is a purpose-built listening space; the front bar runs independently even when a show is on.
